LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MICHAEL BASURTO AND FRANK HARRELL'S MOTION FOR $1,875.00 IN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 425.16(C). THE MOTION IS TIMELY FILED AND REASONABLE CONSIDERING THE COMPLEXITY OF ISSUES, EXPERTISE OF COUNSEL, AND AMOUNT OF TIME INVOLVED. (SEE RUSSELL V. FOGLIO (2008) 160 CAL.APP.4TH 653, 661.) LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MICHAEL BASURTO AND FRANK HARRELL'S SPECIAL MOTION TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP 425.16 IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS HAVE SATISFIED THEIR BURDEN OF MAKING A PRIMA FACIE SHOWING THAT THE ALLEGED WRONGFUL CONDUCT ARISES FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY UNDER CCP SECTION 425.16. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRODUCED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO DEMONSTRATE A PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON HER CLAIMS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302)

Off Calendar Nov-08-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn Anf Mtn For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CAROL TRUFANT, 510.221.4504, PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER.
ELIABETH PEDERSON, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR DEFENDANTS.

ULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTs CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MICHAEL BASURTO and FRANK HARRELL's Motion For $1,875.00 in attorney's fees and costs is granted pursuant to CCP 425.16(c). The motion is timely filed and reasonable considering the complexity of issues, expertise of counsel, and amount of time involved. (See Russell v. Foglio (2008) 160 Cal.App.4th 653, 661.) Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2013 Continued To Nov-27-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendants City And County Of San Francisco, Michael Basurto And Frank Harrell'S Special Motion To Dismiss And Special Motion To Dismiss Pltf'S Complaint Pursuant To Ccp 425.16
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - CAROL TRUFANT, TEL. NO. (510) 221-4504, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. ELIZABETH PEDERSON, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3862 APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; Defendants City And County Of San Francisco, Michael Basurto And Frank Harrell's Special Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Complaint Pursuant To Ccp 425.16 is Granted. Defendants have satisfied their burden of making a prima facie showing that the alleged wrongful conduct arises from protected activity under CCP Section 425.16. Plaintiff has not produced sufficient evidence to demonstrate a probability of prevailing on her claims. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
